speaker: DUKE
text: No, holy father, throw away that thought.

speaker: DUKE
text: Believe not that the dribbling dart of love

speaker: DUKE
text: Can pierce a complete bosom. Why I desire thee

speaker: DUKE
text: To give me secret harbor hath a purpose

speaker: DUKE
text: More grave and wrinkled than the aims and ends

speaker: DUKE
text: Of burning youth.

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              THOMAS
text: May your Grace speak of it?

speaker: DUKE
text: My holy sir, none better knows than you

speaker: DUKE
text: How I have ever loved the life removed,

speaker: DUKE
text: And held in idle price to haunt assemblies

speaker: DUKE
text: Where youth and cost witless bravery keeps.

speaker: DUKE
text: I have delivered to Lord Angelo,

speaker: DUKE
text: A man of stricture and firm abstinence,

speaker: DUKE
text: My absolute power and place here in Vienna,

speaker: DUKE
text: And he supposes me traveled to Poland,

speaker: DUKE
text: For so I have strewed it in the common ear,

speaker: DUKE
text: And so it is received. Now, pious sir,

speaker: DUKE
text: You will demand of me why I do this.

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              THOMAS
text: Gladly, my lord.

speaker: DUKE
text: We have strict statutes and most biting laws,

speaker: DUKE
text: The needful bits and curbs to headstrong weeds,

speaker: DUKE
text: Which for this fourteen years we have let slip,

speaker: DUKE
text: Even like an o’ergrown lion in a cave

speaker: DUKE
text: That goes not out to prey. Now, as fond fathers,

speaker: DUKE
text: Having bound up the threat’ning twigs of birch

speaker: DUKE
text: Only to stick it in their children’s sight

speaker: DUKE
text: For terror, not to use—in time the rod

speaker: DUKE
text: More mocked than feared—so our decrees,

speaker: DUKE
text: Dead to infliction, to themselves are dead,

speaker: DUKE
text: And liberty plucks justice by the nose,

speaker: DUKE
text: The baby beats the nurse, and quite athwart

speaker: DUKE
text: Goes all decorum.

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              THOMAS
text: It rested in your Grace

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              THOMAS
text: To unloose this tied-up justice when you pleased,

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              THOMAS
text: And it in you more dreadful would have seemed

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              THOMAS
text: Than in Lord Angelo.

speaker: DUKE
text: I do fear, too dreadful.

speaker: DUKE
text: Sith ’twas my fault to give the people scope,

speaker: DUKE
text: ’Twould be my tyranny to strike and gall them

speaker: DUKE
text: For what I bid them do; for we bid this be done

speaker: DUKE
text: When evil deeds have their permissive pass

speaker: DUKE
text: And not the punishment. Therefore, indeed, my father,

speaker: DUKE
text: I have on Angelo imposed the office,

speaker: DUKE
text: Who may in th’ ambush of my name strike home,

speaker: DUKE
text: And yet my nature never in the fight

speaker: DUKE
text: To do in slander. And to behold his sway

speaker: DUKE
text: I will, as ’twere a brother of your order,

speaker: DUKE
text: Visit both prince and people. Therefore I prithee

speaker: DUKE
text: Supply me with the habit, and instruct me

speaker: DUKE
text: How I may formally in person bear

speaker: DUKE
text: Like a true friar. More reasons for this action

speaker: DUKE
text: At our more leisure shall I render you.

speaker: DUKE
text: Only this one: Lord Angelo is precise,

speaker: DUKE
text: Stands at a guard with envy, scarce confesses

speaker: DUKE
text: That his blood flows or that his appetite

speaker: DUKE
text: Is more to bread than stone. Hence shall we see,

speaker: DUKE
text: If power change purpose, what our seemers be.
